# Chi-Nata (Chicago Sonata) Icons (retro-kare-chinata-icons)

**Upstream:** https://github.com/DawnVespero/Chi-Nata
**License:** CC BY-SA 4.0 (Attribution-ShareAlike) — see LICENSE

## What it looks like
An icon pack that recreates the look of MacOS 9's desktop icons — the post-System-7, pre-OS-X
era where icons were full-color 32x32 with slight dimension, not Kare's original 1-bit 32x32,
but still in that Kare lineage (Platinum-era icon style).

## What it offers
- Desktop icons (folders, files, drives, applications, trash)
- System-chrome icons
- Usable as replacement for modern Finder

## Clawmachine fit
HIGH for "classic-but-chromatic" icon lane. Where system.css is pure 1-bit, chi-nata fills the
gap toward color while staying retro-mac. CC BY-SA means attribution required AND derivatives
must inherit same license — fine for internal but contaminating for any shipped distribution;
use as reference/visual-gold, not as import-into-app assets without review.
